framework.name: UCP Three-Party Payment Separation
framework.description: UCP separates payment instruments (cards, wallets) from payment handlers (processing specs) from merchant configuration. Providers author handler specs, merchants configure credentials, platforms execute. This is orchestration-layer abstraction, not portable spending authority.
framework.raw_quote: Google Pay or Stripe author handler specs, merchants configure them with credentials, platforms execute them. This three-way separation lets merchants use any processor while supporting any payment method.

source.title: Google's Universal Commerce Protocol: What It Means for Payment ...
